message.content:
{
  "lean_declaration": "theorem coeff_finitely_determined_iff (a : I → PowerSeries R) (n : ℕ) :\n  (CoeffFinitelyDeterminedInSum a n ↔ ∃ M : Finset I, DeterminesCoeffInSum a M n) ∧\n  (CoeffFinitelyDeterminedInProd a n ↔ ∃ M : Finset I, DeterminesCoeffInProd a M n) :=\nby\n  constructor <;> rfl",
  "declaration_name": "coeff_finitely_determined_iff",
  "used_context": [
    "CoeffFinitelyDeterminedInSum",
    "CoeffFinitelyDeterminedInProd",
    "DeterminesCoeffInSum",
    "DeterminesCoeffInProd",
    "Finset I"
  ],
  "notes": [
    "Both parts (a) and (b) of the definition are captured as a single conjunction of trivial equivalences; the definitions are already present in the context, so the proof is by definitional reflection."
  ]
}
